raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2023, I purchased online from XXXX a camera with XXXX lenses for {$540.00} and charged it to my American Express credit card. The product never arrived. I tried to contact the merchant, but their email, phone number, and contact us links are not working. 

I disputed the charge with Amex. The dispute was denied because the merchant supplied a XXXX tracking number showing a completed delivery. I queried XXXX and they gave me documents showing that the deliverys recipient was not my name nor my address and the product shipped was an envelope weighing less than a pound, too small to contain a camera and lenses. 

Ive reopened the dispute multiple times with this info and Amex repeatedly denies the dispute saying the merchant sent proof of delivery. 

My main points : -I and my address was not specified as the recipient of the XXXX shipment. 
-I have no way to contact the merchant.
